content:
## Page Section / Title
Logotype

## All Verbatim Text
aisalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox

Logotype

1.1 CONSTRUCTION GRID

The grid provides a fundamental structure that ensures accuracy and balance in design, guiding the placement and size of elements to maintain visual harmony and coherence.

To preserve the complete legibility of the symbol, the brand must define a protective area around it (based on the "L" letter). This space should not be occupied by other elements, such as texts, images, or other marks, to avoid interference.

EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: 
  - Primary logo: Rectangular black border enclosing "aisalon" (lowercase "a" with dot, "i" with dot, "s" with geometric cutout, "a", "l", "o", "n") in bold black sans-serif type, with "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" in smaller uppercase sans-serif below. Gray construction grid lines visible inside border. 
  - Secondary logo: Smaller "aisalon" in light gray with "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" in lighter gray below, no border.
  - Clear space: Defined by "L" letter shape (protective area) around logo; no other elements allowed in this space.
- **Color palette**: Black (logo text/border), white (background), light gray (construction grid/secondary logo).
- **Typography**: 
  - Primary typeface: Bold sans-serif (used for "aisalon").
  - Secondary typeface: Regular sans-serif (used for "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS").
- **Imagery / photography**: None.
- **Iconography**: None.
- **Layout grid**: Construction grid with vertical/horizontal lines (gray) inside logo border; implied page grid with left-aligned text and centered logo.
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: Rectangular logo border, geometric cutout in "s" letter, gray construction grid lines.

## Page Layout Summary
Left-aligned text (title, section header, body copy) on left third of page; centered logo (with construction grid) on right two-thirds; secondary logo below primary logo, right-aligned. Top of page has "aisalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox" left-aligned, small logo right-aligned.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- Define protective area around logo (based on "L" letter) to preserve legibility; this space must not contain other elements (texts, images, marks) to avoid interference.
